# NOME: Direttrice 32 (Novara - Saronno – Milano)
# CAPOLINEA: NOVARA, CADORNA

# SERVIZIO: R27

1211, 4213-S01066, 1213, 4217-S01066, 1217, 4223-S01066, 1223, 4229-S01066, 1229, 4231-S01066, 1231, 4235-S01066, 1235, 4241-S01066, 1241, 4245-S01066, 1245, 4249-S01066, 1249, 4255-S01066, 1255, 4259-S01066, 1259, 4265-S01066, 1265, 4273-S01066, 1273, 4279-S01066, 1279, 4283-S01066, 1283

1214, 4214-S00023, 1222, 4222-S00023, 4226-S00023, 1226, 4232-S00023, 1232, 4236-S00023, 1236, 4240-S00023, 1240, 4244-S00023, 1244, 4246-S00023, 1246, 4250-S00023, 1250, 4254-S00023, 1254, 4260-S00023, 1260, 4266-S00023, 1266, 4270-S00023, 1270, 4276-S00023, 1276, 4280-S00023, 1280
